title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SM-1G-S-2 (UF-SM-1G-S) - U Fiber, Single-Mode Module, 1G, BiDi, 2-Pack
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP
description: UF-SM-1G-S is set of singlemode 1G SFP WDM modules with 1 LC connector. Wave length is 1310/1550nm , this modules are suitable for distance up to 3km . Modules are compatible with all Ubiquiti devices which contain SFP+ ports. Package contains 2 pieces - 1 function pair
